title: The Process of Independent Certification for Trustworthy AI
description: This flowchart illustrates the key stages and entities involved in achieving independent, third-party certification for a Human-Centred AI system, ensuring it is trustworthy.
elements: Established Trustworthy AI Standards (e.g., ISO, EU AI Act)
relationships: Developer submits system to Oversight Body for audit
Oversight Body evaluates system against Standards
Oversight Body grants Certification if compliant
